recommendations.title: Kingdom 2: Far and Away
recommendations.overview: It follows a young man who dreams of becoming a general and Ying Zheng, whose goal is unification.

recommendations.title: Inuyashiki
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged office worker encounters aliens and is gifted with alien technology and limitless powers.

recommendations.title: Kingdom: Return of the Great General
recommendations.overview: Depicts a continuation of the "Battle of Mayang", an all-out war against the neighboring country Zhao that Shin and Wang Ki fought in in the previous work "Flame of Fate".

recommendations.title: Gantz: Perfect Answer
recommendations.overview: Summoned by the black sphere, Kei and Masaru fight against extraterrestrials until Masaru grows tired of fighting and refuses to continue.

recommendations.title: Kingdom III: The Flame of Destiny
recommendations.overview: To defend their kingdom against a sudden invasion, a mighty general returns to the battlefield alongside a war orphan, now grown up, who dreams of glory.

recommendations.title: Gantz
recommendations.overview: After trying to rescue a man on the subway tracks, two teens wake up in a room dominated by a mysterious black sphere that sends them to hunt down and kill aliens hiding on Earth.

recommendations.title: I Am a Hero
recommendations.overview: A man witnesses a fatal traffic accident on his way home from work, and the victim is clearly killed on impact. A moment later, when the corpse stands up and walks away, it could be a hallucination or something far more extraordinary.

recommendations.title: Kingdom
recommendations.overview: Set in Qin Dynasty during the warring states period in ancient China. Shin was a war orphan. He has a dream of becoming a great general Shin has a fateful encounter with young King Eisei. King Eisei aims to unify all of China.

recommendations.title: Death Note: Light Up the NEW World
recommendations.overview: 10 years has passed since the confrontation between Kira and L. Again, Shinigami sends death notes to the ground and due to this, the world soon falls into chaos. Tsukuru is a member of the Death Note special task force team with 6 other investigator

recommendations.title: Jujutsu Kaisen 0
recommendations.overview: Yuta Okkotsu is a nervous high school student who is suffering from a serious problem—his childhood friend Rika has turned into a curse and won't leave him alone. Since Rika is no ordinary curse, his plight is noticed by Satoru Gojo, a teacher at Juj
